name: devspace-manager
description: Start, stop, and verify a local DevSpace MCP bridge for ChatGPT coding sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Manage a DevSpace MCP server and HTTPS tunnel.
interface.longDescription: DevSpace Manager installs a repeatable Codex workflow for launching, stopping, and verifying a local DevSpace MCP server exposed through a controlled HTTPS tunnel for ChatGPT connector use.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start DevSpace for this workspace and verify the connector URL.
